plugins.name: jira-mcp-setup
plugins.description: Install and configure the Jira MCP server (mcp-atlassian) for Claude Code. Adds Jira integration via Model Context Protocol.

plugins.name: netsuite-restlet
plugins.description: NetSuite RESTlet integration reference. Use when building features that sync data from NetSuite (employees, projects, timesheets, OAuth 1.0 TBA).

plugins.name: deel-api
plugins.description: Deel REST API integration reference. Use when building features that sync data from Deel (people, organizations, teams, departments, time-off, contracts, lookups).

plugins.name: prd-mock-audit
plugins.description: Audit UX HTML mocks against a PRD. Bi-directional gap analysis (PRD→Mock + Mock→PRD), mock self-validation, PRD internal consistency, component consistency checks, and functional UI inventory. Generates structured markdown report, annotated HTML with 8-category highlights, and interactive coverage heatmap. Supports delta mode and build readiness.

plugins.name: prd-ux-audit
plugins.description: Bi-directional reconciliation of PRD requirements against UX Design System specifications. Detects conflicts, terminology drift, coverage gaps, and undocumented UX additions. Generates markdown reconciliation report and interactive PRD↔UX matrix HTML. Pure document-level analysis — no HTML mocks needed.

plugins.name: ux-mock-audit
plugins.description: Bi-directional audit of UX Design System documents against HTML mock implementations. Captures screenshots via Puppeteer at multiple breakpoints, performs visual comparison, and generates markdown analysis report, annotated HTML with 11-category highlights, interactive coverage heatmap, and screenshot gallery. Supports project-specific rules for framework compliance and delta mode for regression tracking.
